_comment: Tone-integrated prompt test — same 5 cases, v1.1 prompt with Betrayal voice + tone calibration
_prompt_version: v1.1 (tone system integration — The Betrayal voice, level calibration, banned openings, profanity rules)

_runs.note: All 5 in single run, ~5.5 min (faster than previous Opus run at 630s)

summary.pass_criteria: 0 hard-field FAILs, tone aligned with The Betrayal voice at appropriate level
summary.tone_assessment: 4/5 clearly on-brand, 1/5 (Vidal, level 2) slightly mild but appropriate for level
summary.field_accuracy: All fields structurally valid. One edge case flag: Glossip vote_split 6-2 (Gorsuch recusal) correctly identified in editorial but not flagged in confidence fields.
summary.throughput: 5 cases in 330s (~5.5 min) — nearly 2x faster than previous Opus run (630s)

cases.tone: Soft flag — competent eye-roll but slightly mild for brand. Appropriate for level 2.
cases.summary_spicy_preview: The PTO said no to registering 'Trump too small' as a trademark, and nine justices agreed...

cases.tone: On-brand. Cold fury appropriate for level 4. Names names. 'Six justices had to drag a man off death row.'
cases.summary_spicy_preview: The state's star witness lied about his psychiatric meds. The prosecutor knew and said nothing...

cases.case_name: City and County of San Francisco v. EPA
cases.hard_fields: 8/8 PASS — all gold truth fields match
cases.tone: On-brand. Sardonic critique. 'dictionary from 1961 and ignored fifty years of practice.'
cases.summary_spicy_preview: The EPA told San Francisco: don't pollute the ocean. Five justices said that's not specific enough...

cases.case_name: FDA v. Wages and White Lion
cases.tone: On-brand. Dry humor. 'the lawyers aren't done billing.'
cases.summary_spicy_preview: The Fifth Circuit tried to green-light flavored vapes by accusing the FDA of moving the goalposts...

cases.case_name: Medina v. Planned Parenthood South Atlantic
cases.tone: On-brand, strongest of five. Angry accountability. Calls out hypocrisy directly. 'slammed the courthouse door on Medicaid patients.'
cases.summary_spicy_preview: Six justices slammed the courthouse door on Medicaid patients...

comparison_to_previous.vs_opus_v1: Same hard field accuracy. Major improvement in editorial voice — previous run was 'good journalism but too neutral.' Now clearly aligned with The Betrayal brand voice.
comparison_to_previous.vs_sonnet_v1: Hard fields: Opus still outperforms (correct 6-2 on Glossip, all 3 dissenters on Medina). Tone: Dramatically better with v1.1 prompt.
comparison_to_previous.throughput: 330s vs 630s (previous Opus) — 48% faster. May be due to simpler prompt bootstrap or server conditions.
